content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 2,
  "rationale": "The client begins fully defended in the 'fine, fearlessness is not my deal' frame and ends still largely in that frame ('It's a discipline problem, I think. I just need to set a date and hold it'). However, there is partial movement: by turn 13, the client offers a genuinely new image — 'it's like reaching for something and your hand goes through it' — which is a more textured, less defended description than the earlier 'fine/nothing notable.' The smile becomes 'a little more neutral,' and the client admits frustration. This is the approach to the numbness layer — the hand-going-through-it IS the not-quite-here-ness — but the client has not yet recognized it as a felt quality happening right now. The breakthrough condition (client noticing 'huh, that IS something') is approached but not met. The coach's final turn (14) is well-placed to invite that recognition, but within the transcript we see the territory neared, not entered. Score 2 fits: a deeper layer was approached but not yet inhabited.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 5, 7, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: 'fear isn't really my deal,' framed as logistics/discipline."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client reports 'fine' without texture; no felt quality yet."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Body check returns 'fine, relaxed, nothing notable' — defenses intact."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Client doubles down on calibration self-concept; resists the noticed look-away."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First small concession: the email, four drafts — but reframed as craft."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client names the puzzle: 'none of this actually feels like a big deal when I look at it directly.' Honest, but still surface."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Key shift: 'reaching for something and your hand goes through it.' New, more textured language that gestures toward the numbness layer, though not yet felt as present-moment quality."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["disassociating-in-the-coaching-room"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-happiness-filter", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "lets-go-there", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "how-is-my-anxiety-right-now", "disassociation-as-numbness-layer"],
  "notes": "Coach's final question (turn 14) is well-aimed at the numbness layer via the client's own metaphor; with another few turns the conversation could plausibly reach a 3. As scored within the visible transcript, the felt recognition has not landed yet."
}
